title: ipomoea pes-tigridis subvar. longibracteata
intro: Ipomoea pes-tigridis subvar. longibracteata, also known as the "dragon flower" or "long-bracted morning glory," is a subvariety of the Ipomoea pes-tigridis plant, a flowering vine native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Ipomoea pes-tigridis subvar. longibracteata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
